Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Webinar by Dr. Meenakshi Devi Go Back Sep, 08 2023 at 12:15 pm Webinar by Dr. Meenakshi Devi Dr. Meenakshi Devi is currently working as a Senior Lecturer (Mathematics) in the Department of Mathematical Sciences, Sol Plaatje University (SPU), South Africa. Prior to joining SPU, she worked as a postdoctoral fellow at the University of KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. She also worked as an Assistant Professor and Head of the Department of Mathematics at Bahra University. She earned her Ph. D. in Mathematics from JUIT in November 2014. She is the author of several research papers published in various journals/conferences. Her research area includes algebraic coding theory, information theory and error-correcting codes. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
